headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -58.3)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 216% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 132 quotes and a striking 102 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting forcefully rather than just grumbling.
• At 57.2, frustrations sit in the upper-middle of their 169-day range (-1.1 to 169.3), signalling elevated but not peak discontent.
• Optimism recovered notably from yesterday's -40.1 to -8.4, though it remains in negative territory near the lower end of its historical range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
